data.name: Hunted on Eclipse-9
data.detailed_description:
Choose between playing as a futanari or male Sibyl as you explore the Eclipse-9 space station. An error in the system has caused the bio-enginerring cloning station to go haywire! All staff have been captured and are having their genetic data continually harvested by way of semen extraction. It's up to you to fill 6 seperate recepticles with your own cum to overload the system and shutdown the the station's systems. But beware, you are being follow by RubiA, a powerful android intent on capturing you and keeping you all to herself!

Features:

  • Multiple scenes including masturbation, blowjob, sex and more

  • Character customisation: choose between gender, skin colour and clothing

  • All scenes are fully animated in 3d

  • Jizz physics: semen will stick to surfaces

  • Fully voice acted

  • Options for one-handed keyboard or mouse-only controls

  • Buttplug.io support: most interactable sextoys should be compatible!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64Bit
  • 處理器: i5-8400
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 1060
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
